footer.description: Transforming innovative ideas into successful SaaS products. Startup-friendly MVP development with guaranteed 6-8 week delivery.
footer.newsletterText: Get the latest insights on SaaS development and startup growth.
footer.privacyText: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.

pricing.title: MVP Development
pricing.description: Launch your SaaS MVP in 6-8 weeks. Startup-friendly pricing with guaranteed results.
pricing.bottomTitle: Not sure which MVP package fits?
pricing.bottomText: Let's discuss your specific needs and find the perfect package to launch your SaaS MVP.

services.description: We build AI-powered SaaS platforms, automate your business with n8n, and deploy intelligent agent workflows.
services.cardText: From AI-accelerated SaaS development to n8n automations and intelligent agent workflows — we handle the full stack.
services.pill1Text: AI-accelerated SaaS from idea to launch
services.pill3Text: Intelligent agent workflows for complex tasks
services.item1Text: We build SaaS platforms accelerated by AI — from concept to launch with modern architecture that scales.
services.item2Text: Custom automation workflows connecting your tools and systems to eliminate manual work and reduce errors.
services.item3Text: Intelligent agent workflows using OpenClaw/Hermes to automate complex business processes end-to-end.
services.diff1Text: We don't just build software — we embed AI and automation into every layer of your product.
services.diff2Text: From SaaS frontends to n8n backend workflows and AI agents — we deliver the complete system.
services.diff3Text: We optimize for speed-to-value: launch your SaaS with built-in automations and AI agents from day one.

features.description: We combine startup speed with enterprise-grade architecture. Launch fast, validate your idea, and be ready to scale when success hits.
features.f1Text: Get to market fast with our proven development sprint system. No endless development cycles - just rapid, focused execution.
features.f2Text: Built on modern tech stack with clean architecture. When you need to scale, your codebase won't hold you back.
features.f3Text: Analytics and user feedback tools built-in. Track key metrics and gather insights from day one.
features.f4Text: Security and compliance built-in from the start. Ready for enterprise customers when opportunity knocks.
features.f5Text: We're your tech co-founder. Get expert guidance on architecture decisions, scaling strategy, and technical roadmap.
features.f6Text: You own all the code. Clean, documented, and ready for your team to take over when you scale.
features.bottomText: Ready to turn your SaaS idea into reality?

benefits.description: AI-enhanced expertise delivering measurable business impact. We don't just build software – we engineer revenue growth.
benefits.b1Text: Solid experience combined with AI creates faster, smarter development cycles without compromising quality.
benefits.b2Text: We measure success by your business outcomes, not just code delivery. Real software that creates real impact.
benefits.b3Text: Full-stack expertise from concept to deployment and maintenance. We handle everything so you can focus on growth.
benefits.b4Text: We work as an extension of your team, not just a vendor. Your success is our success.
benefits.bottomText: Join industry leaders who trust ORION to deliver measurable business outcomes. Let's build something remarkable together.

showcase.block1Text: Transform complex business processes into simple, automated workflows. Our intuitive drag-and-drop interface makes it easy to design, deploy, and manage workflows that save time and reduce errors.
showcase.block1Point1: Drag-and-drop workflow builder with 200+ pre-built templates
showcase.block2Text: Make data-driven decisions with comprehensive analytics and real-time insights. Track performance, identify trends, and optimize your operations with advanced reporting tools.
showcase.bottomText: Join thousands of companies already using Orion to streamline operations and accelerate growth.

testimonials.description: From idea to funded startup in weeks. See how founders like you launched their SaaS success stories.
testimonials.t1Quote: "From idea to funded startup in 7 weeks. ORION built our MVP with the perfect balance of speed and scalability. We raised $2M seed round within 3 months of launch."
testimonials.t2Quote: "ORION delivered our MVP in 6 weeks. The architecture is so clean that our in-house team took over seamlessly. Hit $10K MRR in month 2."
testimonials.t3Quote: "Enterprise-grade MVP in 8 weeks. The architecture and documentation were so good, we passed our enterprise security review on the first try. Now at $50K MRR."
testimonials.bottomText: Join these founders in turning your SaaS vision into reality. Book a free strategy call to get started.

caseStudies.description: Innovative solutions driving digital transformation across industries.
caseStudies.project1Alt: AI Files Management - Smart categorization and organization
caseStudies.project1Desc: Revolutionary document management system that uses advanced AI to automatically categorize, organize, and retrieve files. Features intelligent search capabilities, automated workflows, and seamless integration with existing systems.
caseStudies.project2Alt: AI Invoice Extractor - Extract invoice data intelligently
caseStudies.project2Desc: Advanced OCR and AI-powered invoice processing solution that automates data extraction, validation, and integration with accounting systems. Reduces processing time by 95% while maintaining 99% accuracy.
caseStudies.project3Alt: Residential Access Control - Modern security platform
caseStudies.project3Desc: Next-generation residential security platform featuring biometric authentication, real-time monitoring, and mobile app control. Provides comprehensive access management for modern residential complexes and smart homes.

process.description: Our battle-tested process turns your SaaS vision into reality with speed and precision. No cutting corners, just smart execution.
process.step1Desc: We start with a deep dive into your vision. Define core features, map user journeys, and design scalable architecture that won't need a rewrite at 100K users.
process.step2Desc: Two-week sprints with working demos every Friday. Focus on core features first, then nice-to-haves. Built with modern stack and clean code that's ready for your future team.
process.step3Desc: Rigorous testing of user flows and edge cases. Set up analytics and feedback loops. Ensure your MVP is not just working, but ready for real users.
process.step4Desc: Deploy to production, set up monitoring, and prepare growth tools. You get full code ownership and documentation. Ready to onboard early users and start collecting revenue.
process.ctaTitle: Ready to start your MVP journey?

contact.benefit2Text: Review your current systems and identify the best integration approach.
contact.benefit3Text: Get a clear timeline and next steps for your automation project.
